calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Sealing The Record
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Ravneet Sandhu, Esq. (408-890-1457; NSANDHU@GOINSLAWFIRM.COM) of LAW OFFICES OF VERNON C. GOINS for Moving Party.
No other appearances.

ARGUED The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KRISTARA SANTOS' Notice Of Motion For Order Sealing The Record:

Kristara Santos' motion for an order sealing "the entire action" is denied as overbroad, without prejudice to filing of a more targeted motion.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

ARGUED The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Action Pending Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT KRISTARA SANTOS'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Action Pending Arbitration Award is Off calendar. The court signed the Stipulation and Order for Entry of Stay Pending Arbitration submitted by the parties on December 30, 2019.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
